steps.t: The forester Ainhard lives south of Vegbár. You should talk to Ainhard. If Ainhard is not at his home, he may have already headed to Vegbár.
The wood planks can be found outside Ainhard's home. You should collect the wood planks.
With the new planks, you can now repair some of the damaged walls in Vegbár. You should repair damaged walls in Vegbár.
Skalla can be found in Vegbár, the Beorning outpost in the Wolf-denes. You should talk to Skalla.
